pattern: Two pointers moving at different speeds must eventually meet inside any loop, which detects a cycle in constant space where a visited-set costs linear memory.
hints: Storing every visited node works but uses memory proportional to the list; the follow-up asks for constant space.
Advance one pointer a single step and another two steps per iteration.
If there is a loop the fast pointer laps the slow one and they collide; if the fast pointer reaches the end there is none.

edge_inputs.description: cycle back to the second node
two nodes looping to the head
longer straight list without any loop
duplicate values must not be mistaken for a revisit

stress.description: random list with a randomly placed cycle or none at all
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(0, max(1, min(size, 300)))
    values = [rng.randint(-100, 100) for _ in range(n)]
    pos = rng.randint(0, n - 1) if n and rng.random() < 0.5 else None
    return [{"values": values, "pos": pos}]
